raw_title: Can Visuals Facilitate or Detract Attention to Text? Examining the Effects of the Amount and Type of Visuals on Attention to Digital Longforms
title_en: Can Visuals Facilitate or Detract Attention to Text? Examining the Effects of the Amount and Type of Visuals on Attention to Digital Longforms
title_zh: 视觉元素是促进还是分散对文本的注意力？研究视觉元素的数量和类型对数字长篇内容注意力的影响
plain_summary_zh: 这项研究探讨了在数字长篇内容中，视觉元素（如图片、视频）如何影响读者对文本的注意力。研究人员想了解视觉元素的数量和类型是会帮助读者更好地关注文字，还是会分散他们的注意力。
plain_summary_en: This study investigates how visual elements (like images and videos) in digital longform content affect readers' attention to text. Researchers want to know whether the amount and type of visuals help readers focus better on the text or distract them from it.
research_direction_zh: 数字媒体环境下视觉与文本交互对用户认知和阅读体验的影响研究
research_direction_en: Research on the impact of visual-text interaction on user cognition and reading experience in digital media environments
